info.title: dotnet-check-updates
info.description:
dotnet-check-updates checks for possible upgrades of NuGet 
packages in C# projects.
By default, dotnet-check-updates will search the current directory for C# 
project (.csproj) files.
If no project files are found, it will then search for solution (.sln) files in 
the current directory.

options.name: --concurrency
options.description:
Max number of concurrent HTTP requests. Minimum is 1 and
maximum is 32. (default: 8)

options.name: --cwd
options.description:
Sets the current working directory. (default: current
directory)

options.name: --depth
options.description:
Recursion depth. Only applied when --recurse is also
specified.
Minimum is 1 and maximum is 16.
Set to 0 to search arbitrary directory depth. (default: 4)

options.name: --exclude
options.description:
Exclude package names matching the given string, glob or
comma-or-space-delimited list.
Example: System*
Aliases: -E, --reject, --exc

options.name: --filter
options.description:
Include only package names matching the given string, glob
or comma-or-space-delimited list.
Example: System*
Aliases: -I, --include, --inc

options.name: --interactive
options.description:
Enable interactive prompts for each package. Implies
--upgrade.

options.name: --list
options.description:
Lists current packages and their versions even if they have
no upgrade available. (default: false)

options.name: --no-progress
options.description:
Do not show progress bar when fetching package
information.

options.name: --nuget-source
options.description:
Specifies the URI of the NuGet package source to use during
the check.
This setting overrides all of the sources specified in the nuget.config files.
Multiple sources can be provided by specifying this option multiple
times.

options.name: --page-size
options.description:
Sets the number of items per page when running in
interactive mode.
Has no effect unless --interactive is specified.
(default: 10)

options.name: --project
options.description:
Path to a .csproj file to search for upgrades. Exclusive
with --solution. (default: searches for .csproj files in the current
directory)

options.name: --show-absolute
options.description:
Shows absolute paths when printing projects and solutions.
(default: false)

options.name: --show-package-count
options.description:
Shows number of packages found in each project after
filtering has been applied

options.name: --solution
options.description:
Path to a .sln file to search for projects. Exclusive with
--project. (default: searches for .sln files in the current directory if no
.csproj files are found)

options.name: --target
options.description:
Determines the version to upgrade to:
latest, greatest, major, minor, patch, pre-major, pre-minor, pre-patch.
(default: latest)

options.name: --upgrade
options.description:
Upgrades packages to the appropriate version based on the
current --target option. (default: false)

options.name: --version
options.description:
Shows the version of the application. Exits after
outputting the version.
